data.narrative:
KrattWorks is a Series A–stage Defense & Security company founded by Martin Karmin with €19.7M in reported revenue. The valuation assessment draws from a comparable universe of 10 private and 2 public companies in the defense technology sector, including peers such as Stark Defence, Vatn Systems, Ares Industries, Anduril Industries, and Scale AI.

The peer-median method, applied across three same-sector, same-stage comparables, yields a central valuation of $300M. The peer set ranges from $150M (Ares Industries) to $500M (Stark Defence), with Vatn Systems at $300M. This method is the primary triangulation anchor given the limited availability of alternative methodologies with sufficient data granularity for this stage and sector.

Analysis supports a valuation range of $255M to $345M, centered on $300M. The relatively tight distribution around the median reflects consistency within the peer cohort, though key uncertainties remain: revenue quality and growth trajectory relative to comps, customer concentration, and technology differentiation within the crowded defense-tech landscape. The €19.7M revenue figure provides a revenue multiple checkpoint but requires normalized comparison to peer top-line figures for deeper validation. Further data on burn rate, customer diversification, and intellectual property position would narrow the range materially.
